016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.controller;
017
018import android.os.Bundle;
019import android.view.LayoutInflater;
020import android.view.Menu;
021import android.view.MenuInflater;
022import android.view.MenuItem;
023import android.view.View;
024import android.view.ViewGroup;
025import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
026import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
027import androidx.core.view.MenuProvider;
028import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
029import androidx.lifecycle.Lifecycle;
030import androidx.navigation.NavController;
031import androidx.navigation.Navigation;
032import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignIn;
033import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignInClient;
034import com.google.android.gms.auth.api.signin.GoogleSignInOptions;
035import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
036import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.R;
037import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.databinding.FragmentProjectGalleryBinding;
038
039/**
040 * Fragment displaying the user's project gallery. Shows a list of pixel art projects
041 * and provides navigation to create new projects or edit existing ones.
042 */
043@AndroidEntryPoint
044public class ProjectGalleryFragment extends Fragment {
045
046  private FragmentProjectGalleryBinding binding;
047  private GoogleSignInClient client;
048
049  @Override
050  public void onCreate(@Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
051    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
052    // Configure Google Sign In client for sign out
053    GoogleSignInOptions options = new GoogleSignInOptions.Builder()
054        .requestEmail()
055        .requestId()
056        .requestProfile()
057        .build();
058    client = GoogleSignIn.getClient(requireContext(), options);
059  }
060
061  @Nullable
062  @Override
063  public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container,
064      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
065    binding = FragmentProjectGalleryBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
066    return binding.getRoot();
067  }
068
069  @Override
070  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
071    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
072    setupMenu();
073    setupListeners();
074  }
075
076  @Override
077  public void onDestroyView() {
078    super.onDestroyView();
079    binding = null;
080  }
081
082  private void setupMenu() {
083    requireActivity().addMenuProvider(new MenuProvider() {
084      @Override
085      public void onCreateMenu(@NonNull Menu menu, @NonNull MenuInflater menuInflater) {
086        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.project_gallery_menu, menu);
087      }
088
089      @Override
090      public boolean onMenuItemSelected(@NonNull MenuItem menuItem) {
091        boolean handled;
092        int itemId = menuItem.getItemId();
093        if (itemId == R.id.sign_out) {
094          signOut();
095          handled = true;
096        } else if (itemId == R.id.settings) {
097          navigateToSettings();
098          handled = true;
099        } else {
100          handled = false;
101        }
102        return handled;
103      }
104    }, getViewLifecycleOwner(), Lifecycle.State.RESUMED);
105  }
106
107  private void setupListeners() {
108    binding.newProjectButton.setOnClickListener((v) -> navigateToDrawingCanvas());
109    binding.paletteManagementButton.setOnClickListener((v) -> navigateToPaletteManagement());
110  }
111
112  private void navigateToDrawingCanvas() {
113    NavController navController = Navigation.findNavController(requireView());
114    navController.navigate(R.id.navigate_to_drawing_canvas);
115  }
116
117  private void navigateToPaletteManagement() {
118    NavController navController = Navigation.findNavController(requireView());
119    navController.navigate(R.id.navigate_to_palette_management);
120  }
121
122  private void navigateToSettings() {
123    NavController navController = Navigation.findNavController(requireView());
124    navController.navigate(R.id.navigate_to_settings);
125  }
126
127  private void signOut() {
128    client.signOut().addOnCompleteListener((task) -> {
129      NavController navController = Navigation.findNavController(requireView());
130      navController.navigate(R.id.navigate_to_login);
131    });
132  }
133
134}
